name: Baked Lemon Chicken with Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, lemon juice, chopped Italian parsley, salt, dried oregano, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix gently.
3. Let the chicken marinate at room temperature for 1 hour, turning once.
4. Drain any excess marinade from the chicken.
5. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
6. Bake the chicken for 35 minutes.
7. Cut the red and green peppers into half-inch thick rings.
8. Saute the pepper rings in a pan over medium heat for 8 minutes.
9. Spoon the sauteed peppers around the chicken pieces.
10. Serve and enjoy. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
